title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Motorpoint Warehouse Ltd
body: "Application number 5204  Applicant Motorpoint Limited objected to the name used by Motorpoint Warehouse Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 25 April 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Motorpoint Warehouse Ltd is changed to 15792838, Ltd. "
